description: Powers of influence over mind and will - charming creatures, warping perception, countering spells, and bending the thoughts of others.
abilities: Aura's Silvery Broadcast
A spoken message carried across a wide area in a warm voice that seems to come from everywhere. Background noise hushes itself to let the words carry.
Aurora
A dazzling prismatic aurora across the sky. Common folk stand transfixed. Even hardened foes risk being staggered by its overwhelming beauty.
Bamboozle
Mild confusion planted in a creature's mind. A merchant doubts their prices. A guard forgets who may pass. A dog questions whether it is a good boy.
Befizzle
A curse strangling a creature's magic. Spoken spells forgotten mid-sentence, gestured spells freezing the limbs, channeled magic fizzling into nothing.
Control
Absolute dominion over another's will. Obedience without hesitation, without question. But the magic remembers what you made them do, and so will they.
Enscroll
A known spell inscribed onto a scroll through quiet concentration. Anyone who reads the words aloud activates the spell within, the ink flaring bright and fading to nothing.
Eternal Slumber
Permanent, peaceful sleep placed through a single touch. The enchantment is bound to a chosen trigger: a loved one's embrace, a whispered word at dawn.
False Sense
A touch warps one specific perception. The mayor appears as a clown. Wolves look like playful puppies. Fresh bread reeks of smoke.
Fear
A creature's deepest, most primal fear dragged into waking reality. A nightmare that paralyzes and unravels. A failed attempt traps the caster in that same fear.
Forget
Memories dissolve like ink washed from parchment while the creature sleeps. Days, weeks, or years stripped away, leaving only a hollow feeling where the past once lived.
Interpret
A slip into a creature's mind absorbs the patterns of their language, foreign syllables blooming into meaning. With patience, the fluency becomes permanent.
Invasion
A step into a sleeping creature's dream through touch. The scene is shaped, a suggestion planted, a nightmare conjured. Defeat it, and the dreamer wakes believing revelation.
Lifelink
Two life-forces entwined in a mystical bond. Pain dealt to one echoes in the other, or healing given to one mends both, shaped by the caster's intent.
Mesmerize
An optical illusion so captivating the creature roots in place. Eyes glazed, mouth slack, utterly lost in swirling patterns until the spell breaks.
Message
A touch across distance to someone met before, opening a brief telepathic exchange. With greater power, distance becomes irrelevant.
Modulate
A touch altering physical sensation. Flooding warmth or bitter cold. Revolting taste. Deep relaxation, or the complete denial of rest.
No
A single word slams the door on a nearby spell before it takes effect. At best it detonates in the enemy's hands. At worst the counterspell misfires unpredictably.
Nox
A potent cocktail of sensation infused through touch. Euphoria, deep calm, nausea, or sharp irritability, shaped entirely by intent, flooding through like a drug.
Overthere
A subtle gesture redirecting a creature's fury toward a different target. Rage pivots like a compass needle, holding only while the caster stays out of the fight.
Perky Profanation
An irresistible compulsion cursed into a creature. Helpless laughter. Music that forces dancing. Behaving like a creature of the caster's choosing, such as a preening housecat.
Reflect
An incoming spell caught and hurled back like light off a mirror. It may strike true, scatter harmlessly, or ricochet into an unfortunate ally.
Shape Senses
A touch manipulates color perception. Hues swap, the world saturates to brilliance or drains to grey. An entire sense can be flung to a distant cosmos.
Sigil
A drawn sigil responding to a specific creature passing near. It lures, repels, alerts the caster, or whispers a telepathic message into the creature's mind.
Sleep
A soft lullaby lulling nearby folk into dreamful slumber. Bodies collapse gently into sleep. The enchantment breaks at the first hint of harm.
Speak
Words spoken silently into a nearby creature's mind. Lips move without sound, the voice heard only inside the target's head. Intimate and inescapable.
Spellsteal
A stolen glimpse of a spell's shape, enough to reproduce it once. The knowledge is imperfect and fleeting. Consequences may surprise.
Whisper
A telepathic message heard as though spoken aloud, yet originating from within. With greater power, a brief two-way silent conversation opens.
Wren's Delightful Dream
A creature's next slumber enchanted with deep comfort, warmth, and belonging. Old grudges soften. The glow lingers for days.
